segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Hi, what movie are you seeing?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: The 7:30 showing of the new drama, please.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Somewhere in the middle, not too close to the screen.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That sounds good. Does this showing have captions by any chance?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Open captions, no. Closed caption devices are available at guest services.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. I'll try without one today.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. Which theater is it in?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Theater four, down the hall on the right.
